subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, I beseech Thee by the Dawning-Place of Thy signs and by the Dayspring of Thy Revelation, Who hath been imprisoned in the most desolate of lands, by that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بمطلع آیاتک و بمشرق وحیک الذی سجن فی اخرب البلدان بما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
